title: helianthemum italicum subsp. alpestre
intro: Helianthemum italicum subsp. alpestre is a subspecies of the rockrose plant, native to the mountainous regions of Europe, known for its bright yellow flowers and low-growing, woody stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can aid in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Helianthemum italicum subsp. alpestre include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable herb for promoting overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
